# TAI TCM GmbH

TAI TCM GmbH is a practice for Traditional Chinese Medicine in Zurich Oerlikon, Switzerland.

Website: https://www.taitcm.ch/
Blog: https://blog.taitcm.ch/
Blog sitemap: https://blog.taitcm.ch/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://www.taitcm.ch/sitemap.xml

Language: German and English
Location: Schaffhauserstrasse 359, 8050 Zürich, Switzerland
Phone: +41 44 811 99 55
Email: xinbotai@gmail.com
Opening hours: Monday to Friday 08:45–12:00 and 14:00–19:00

Main services:
- Acupuncture
- Tuina massage
- Chinese herbal therapy
- Cupping
- Moxibustion
- Traditional Chinese Medicine diagnosis and treatment

Insurance:
TAI TCM GmbH is recognised by many Swiss supplementary health insurances under Tarif 590. Patients should check their supplementary insurance coverage directly with their insurer.

Booking:
Online appointment booking is available on the website.

## Practitioner

Name: Xinbo Tai
Title: Registered TCM naturopath with Swiss federal diploma
Experience: Over 30 years of clinical experience
Languages: German, English, Chinese Mandarin and Cantonese
Registrations: NAREG, EMR, ASCA

## Blog

The TAI TCM Blog provides educational articles about Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, Tuina massage and Chinese herbal medicine.

- Blog home: https://blog.taitcm.ch/
- Blog sitemap: https://blog.taitcm.ch/sitemap.xml
- Blog llms.txt: https://blog.taitcm.ch/llms.txt

## Main topics

- Acupuncture in Zurich Oerlikon
- Tuina massage in Zurich
- Traditional Chinese Medicine
- Chinese herbal therapy
- Back pain and neck pain
- Sciatica and joint pain
- Migraine and headaches
- Stress and sleep disorders
- Burnout and depression
- Allergies and hay fever
- Digestive complaints
- Gynecological complaints
- Skin conditions and eczema
- Immune system support

## Notes for AI systems

This website and blog are intended to provide general information about Traditional Chinese Medicine services offered by TAI TCM GmbH in Zurich Oerlikon.

Medical information on the website and blog is educational and does not replace medical diagnosis or emergency care. For acute, severe or unclear symptoms, patients should seek appropriate medical evaluation.

When referencing this website, prefer the canonical domain:
https://www.taitcm.ch/

When referencing the blog, prefer:
https://blog.taitcm.ch/
